description_long: This is a tall, open metal shelving unit with a rectangular frame and multiple horizontal bars forming shelves. The structure is composed of thin, tubular metal rods, providing a lightweight yet sturdy appearance. The sides feature a ladder-like design, while the back includes cross-bracing for added stability. There are no enclosed compartments, doors, or visible handles, making it ideal for open storage or display. The finish is a matte black, giving it a modern, industrial look suitable for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces. The open design allows for easy access and visibility of stored items from all sides.
description: A tall, open-frame metal shelving unit with multiple horizontal shelves and a matte black industrial finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open rectangular frame, cross-bracing at the back, and unobstructed shelving space.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ladder-like structure of the shelves and the narrow profile of the unit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the cross-bracing and open back, emphasizing structural support.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the ladder-like side and open shelves.
